default_settings.order_type: Type of order to place (post_only_limit, limit, market)
default_settings.price_strategy: How to calculate sell price (percentage_above_market, fixed_price)
default_settings.dry_run: If true, will simulate orders without actually placing them

trading_pairs.enabled: Whether to include this pair in automated trading
trading_pairs.quantity: Amount of base asset to sell (as string for precision)
trading_pairs.minimum_sell_price: Minimum price to accept for selling (safety check)
trading_pairs.price_offset_percent: Percentage above current market price to set limit order
trading_pairs.description: Human-readable description of this trading pair
